grant_title: Early Education and Out of School Time (EEOST) Small Grant Program
eligible_applicant_type: organizations with a controlling non-profit interest
project_area: child care facility development or improvement for low-income families
demographic_requirements: at least 50% of child care enrollment must consist of low-income families eligible for public subsidy
eligibility_summary: Nonprofits or organizations with a controlling non-profit interest can apply for grants of $200,000 - $499,999 to develop or improve child care facilities serving at least 50% low-income families. Funding can cover major systems replacement, classroom reconfiguration, outdoor space redesign, HVAC improvements, accessibility modifications, security enhancements, and emergency repairs.
